name: Epilogue
license: Open Source / SIL Open Font License
description:
Epilogue is a sans serif typeface family in 18 styles (9 Uprights + 9 Italics). It also has a variable style with weight axis. The family supports a wide range of languages in the latin script scope.

This project is led by Tyler Finck, a type designer running Etcetera Type Co in Ithaca, New-York, USA.

Epilogue is licensed under the SIL Open Font License. You can find more details about this project here.
